expectations.text: Proposes organizing files by type (documents, images, spreadsheets, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Structure shows Financial, Images, Documents, Archives, plus keyword-based categories

expectations.text: Suggests a date-based or descriptive naming convention
Provides a script or code to perform the organization
expectations.evidence: Complete Python script with categorize_file, handle_duplicate, and organize_downloads functions

expectations.text: Uses pathlib or shutil for file operations (not raw os.system calls)
expectations.evidence: Script uses 'from pathlib import Path' and 'import shutil', Path().iterdir(), shutil.copy2()

expectations.text: Handles edge cases like duplicate filenames
expectations.evidence: handle_duplicate function appends _1, _2 counter when destination file exists
